source_pr.title: plan: fix bug of topn push down
source_pr.body:
When Limit has Offset, the pushed down limit's count should be count + offset.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t left outer join t s on t.a = s.a order by t.a limit 5, 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t left outer join t s on t.a = s.a order by t.a limit 5, 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t left outer join t s on t.a = s.a order by t.a limit 5, 5", (plan/logical_plan_test.go)
